templates.action_template: Maintain a job application tracker recording company, role, date applied, status, and follow-up dates

templates.action_template: Set up alerts on {count} remote-friendly job boards filtered for {goal} roles

templates.action_template: Complete one small, low-friction job-search task each day (e.g., save a job listing, read one article about {industry})

templates.action_template: Research reasonable adjustments available for {barrier} and prepare a brief statement for applications/interviews

templates.action_template: Use a journey planner to map public transport routes to {count} target employers and record travel time/cost options

templates.action_template: Secure weekly digital access by registering for library/community hub computer use and testing login for job search accounts
